Class ContractAppCollector

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.proofmanagement.check.dependency.NodeIntermediateWalker
org.key_project.proofmanagement.check.dependency.ContractAppCollector
public class ContractAppCollector extends NodeIntermediateWalker
Walker for collecting contract applications. This includes:
  • operation contracts (applied inside box or diamond modalities)
  • dependency contracts
  • model method contract axioms

  • Constructor Details

    • ContractAppCollector

      public ContractAppCollector(NodeIntermediate root, Proof proof, Logger logger)
      Creates a new collector for the given proof, starting at given root node.
      Parameters:
      root - the root node to start from
      proof - the proof object (needed to get SpecificationRepository, JavaInfo, ...)
      logger - the logger to print out messages
